title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.600 - Certain business documents deemed closed records
text:
30.600.  Certain business documents deemed closed records. — Records and documents submitted to the state treasurer relating to financial investments in a business, sales figures or projections or other business results or business plan information, the disclosure of which may have a negative impact on the competitiveness of the business, shall be deemed a "closed record" as such term is defined in section 610.010 to 610.030.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1681)
